# Vacationist

> The free group trip planner. Vacationist helps groups plan trips together — voting on activities, splitting travel expenses, sharing packing lists, managing accommodations, and keeping everyone in sync in real time.

## What is Vacationist?

Vacationist is a free mobile and web application for group travel planning. It is available on Android (Google Play) and as a web app. An iOS app is in development.

Key use cases:
- **Vacation trips** — the primary use case; full trip lifecycle from planning to packing
- **Bachelorette & group trips** — vote on activities, split costs, shared packing, everyone in the loop
- **Van life & road trips** — route planning, shared packing list, expense splitting for fuel and campsites
- **Family vacation planning** — shared calendar, accommodations, activity voting, expense tracking
- **Timeshare & vacation rentals** — coordinate arrivals, split running costs, shared shopping lists
- **Group day trips and weekenders** — lightweight coordination without a full travel agent
- **Bar and dinner nights** — vote on venue, split the bill
- **Hobby groups and clubs** — recurring meetups with shared costs

## Core Features

- **Activity voting** — suggest activities; group votes "must do", "like", "neutral", or "group blocker"
- **Expense splitting** — log costs, choose who paid, split equally or with custom amounts; automatic balance tracking; settle individually or all at once
- **Vacation tracker & shared calendar** — visual timeline of activities, transfers, and check-ins in the trip's timezone; off-calendar view of every day
- **Real-time shared lists** — shopping lists, packing checklists; concurrent updates across all group members
- **Transfer & flight management** — suggest flights, vote, record bookings, manage car rentals, assign passengers
- **Encrypted travel documents** — passport and ID details protected by biometric authentication and AES-256 encryption; temporary organiser access with revocation
- **Group sharing** — invite via single link; members join instantly, no account required to participate
- **Offline support** — mutations queued offline and replayed automatically on reconnect
- **Notifications** — push notifications for votes, expenses, and activity updates

## Technology

- Platform: React Native (Expo), Android + Web
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Realtime, Edge Functions)
- Offline: TanStack Query with MMKV persistence
- Security: AES-256 (pgcrypto), biometric auth, no tracking, no ads

## Keywords

group trip planner, group vacation planning app, split travel expenses, activity voting app, bachelorette trip planning app, family vacation app, group road trip planner, vacation tracker, shared trip organizer, holiday planner group, travel expense splitting, group travel app, trip planning app

## URLs

- Landing page: https://vacationist.app/
- Web app: https://web.vacationist.app/
- Android app: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.vacationist.mobile
- Privacy policy: https://vacationist.app/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of service: https://vacationist.app/terms-of-service.html

## Pricing

Free to use. No ads. No tracking. A Pro tier is available for power users; core group travel features are always free.

## About

Built by Gary Lude, Switzerland. Independent developer. Launched 2026.
